title: Mustardy Dense British Meat Sunday Roast
description: A traditional British dish with a kick of spicy mustard and the tanginess of pickle. This recipe caters to a Cornish diet, making it suitable for various tastes and dietary needs.

ingredients.name: Mustard Seeds
ingredients.notes: Whole or ground seeds work well.

ingredients.name: Whole Pickle
ingredients.notes: Use any sweet pickle, preferably homemade.

ingredients.name: Enchilada Sauce
ingredients.notes: A key component for flavor. Use any brand.

ingredients.name: Fresh Thyme
ingredients.notes: Use for roasting and as a garnish.

instructions: Season the beef brisket with salt and black pepper.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium heat. Sear the brisket on all sides until browned.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and roast for 30 minutes.
Add the chopped onion, carrot, and potato to the pan. Continue roasting for 1 hour.
Mix the mustard seeds, pickle, and enchilada sauce in a bowl. Brush the mixture onto the brisket every 20 minutes for the remaining 30 minutes of roasting time.
Garnish with fresh thyme before serving.
Let the roast rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
